base_prompt: Write in a clear, professional academic tone. Use only the provided context. Do not invent facts. Keep the output structured and concise.

sections.title: Introduction
sections.instruction: Introduce the topic and explain its background.

sections.title: Methodology
sections.instruction: Explain the methods, tools, datasets, or workflow mentioned in the context.

subsections.title: Data Sources
subsections.instruction: Describe the source documents or datasets if mentioned.

sections.title: Conclusion
sections.instruction: Summarize the key findings and close the document professionally.
